4.
                                                                                                                Creating
                                                                                                                Certificates: Further information will be shared via the API Hub service desk, including CSRs. For more detailed information please see the example form Pre-Production Environment Specific ConfigurationPreview

4.
                                                                                                                Creating
                                                                                                                Certificates reference: Pre-Production Environment Specific Configuration
4.1 Environment Considerations: OFTF Sandbox is used to issue certificates in the pre-production environment.
4.1 Environment Considerations: OFTF Production is used to issue certificates in the production environment.
4.1 Environment Considerations:
4.2 Certificate Generation for S1, S3 & Sig2 (Private Key Held by API Hub): These certificates should be created under Organisation Certificates

metadata.section: 4.2 Certificate Generation for S1, S3 & Sig2 (Private Key Held by API Hub)

text: 4.2 Certificate Generation for S1, S3 & Sig2 (Private Key Held by API Hub): API Hub generates private keys for the certificates.

metadata.section: 4.2 Certificate Generation for S1, S3 & Sig2 (Private Key Held by API Hub)

text: 4.2 Certificate Generation for S1, S3 & Sig2 (Private Key Held by API Hub): API Hub generates Certificate Signing Requests (CSRs) and provides them to the LFI.

metadata.section: 4.2 Certificate Generation for S1, S3 & Sig2 (Private Key Held by API Hub)

text: 4.2 Certificate Generation for S1, S3 & Sig2 (Private Key Held by API Hub): S1 & S3 must contain the appropriate Subject Alternative Names (SANs) used for domain validation.

metadata.section: 4.2 Certificate Generation for S1, S3 & Sig2 (Private Key Held by API Hub)

text: 4.2 Certificate Generation for S1, S3 & Sig2 (Private Key Held by API Hub): LFI uses the appropriate OFTF directory (Sandbox or Prod) to generate the certificates under the Organisation Certificates section.

metadata.section: 4.2 Certificate Generation for S1, S3 & Sig2 (Private Key Held by API Hub)

text: 4.2 Certificate Generation for S1, S3 & Sig2 (Private Key Held by API Hub): LFI provides the JWKS URL and KID. The JWKS and KID is managed by the OFTF and will be automatically created when the certificates are signed.

metadata.section: 4.2 Certificate Generation for S1, S3 & Sig2 (Private Key Held by API Hub)

text: 4.2 Certificate Generation for S1, S3 & Sig2 (Private Key Held by API Hub):

metadata.section: 4.2 Certificate Generation for S1, S3 & Sig2 (Private Key Held by API Hub)

text: 4.3 Certificate Generation for S4 & Enc1 (Private Key Held by LFI): These certificates should be created under Organisation Certificates

metadata.section: 4.3 Certificate Generation for S4 & Enc1 (Private Key Held by LFI)

text: 4.3 Certificate Generation for S4 & Enc1 (Private Key Held by LFI): LFI uses the appropriate OFTF directory (Sandbox or Prod) and generates the private key & CSR using the script provided on the OFTF

metadata.section: 4.3 Certificate Generation for S4 & Enc1 (Private Key Held by LFI)

text: 4.3 Certificate Generation for S4 & Enc1 (Private Key Held by LFI): S4 must contain the appropriate Subject Alternative Names (SANs) used for domain validation.

metadata.section: 4.3 Certificate Generation for S4 & Enc1 (Private Key Held by LFI)

text: 4.3 Certificate Generation for S4 & Enc1 (Private Key Held by LFI): LFI uses the appropriate OFTF directory (Sandbox or Prod) to generate the certificates under the Organisation Certificates section.

metadata.section: 4.3 Certificate Generation for S4 & Enc1 (Private Key Held by LFI)

text: 4.3 Certificate Generation for S4 & Enc1 (Private Key Held by LFI): LFI provides the JWKS URL and KID. The JWKS and KID is managed by the OFTF and will be automatically created when the certificates are signed.

metadata.section: 4.3 Certificate Generation for S4 & Enc1 (Private Key Held by LFI)

text: 4.4 Certificate Generation for C3 & Sig4 (Private Key Held by LFI): These certificates are used by the LFI for communication to the API Hub.

metadata.section: 4.4 Certificate Generation for C3 & Sig4 (Private Key Held by LFI)

text: 4.4 Certificate Generation for C3 & Sig4 (Private Key Held by LFI): LFI uses the appropriate OFTF directory (Sandbox or Prod) and creates an Application called C3-hh-cm-client

metadata.section: 4.4 Certificate Generation for C3 & Sig4 (Private Key Held by LFI)

text: 4.4 Certificate Generation for C3 & Sig4 (Private Key Held by LFI): LFI generates the private key & CSR in the C3-hh-cm-client under App Certificates using the script provided on the OFTF

metadata.section: 4.4 Certificate Generation for C3 & Sig4 (Private Key Held by LFI)

text: 4.4 Certificate Generation for C3 & Sig4 (Private Key Held by LFI): LFI signs the CSRs in the C3-hh-cm-client under App Certificates

metadata.section: 4.4 Certificate Generation for C3 & Sig4 (Private Key Held by LFI)

text: 4.4 Certificate Generation for C3 & Sig4 (Private Key Held by LFI): LFI provides the JWKS URL and KID on the confluence form

metadata.section: 4.4 Certificate Generation for C3 & Sig4 (Private Key Held by LFI)

text: 4.4 Certificate Generation for C3 & Sig4 (Private Key Held by LFI): *The OFTF Sandbox is used for signing certificates for the pre-production environment and the OFTF Production is used for signing certificates for the Production environment.

metadata.section: 4.4 Certificate Generation for C3 & Sig4 (Private Key Held by LFI)

text: 4.4 Certificate Generation for C3 & Sig4 (Private Key Held by LFI): © Ozone Financial Technology Limited 2024-2025 Ozone Non Commercial Software EULA

metadata.section: 4.4 Certificate Generation for C3 & Sig4 (Private Key Held by LFI)
